name: find
description: Search for files in a directory hierarchy

options.name: -name
options.description: Match the base name against a shell pattern

options.name: -path
options.description: Match the whole path against a shell pattern

options.name: -type
options.description: Restrict matches to a file type

options.name: -maxdepth
options.description: Descend at most this many directory levels

options.name: -size
options.description: Match files of the given size, e.g. +1M

options.name: -mtime
options.description: Match files modified n*24 hours ago

options.name: -newer
options.description: Match files modified more recently than this file

options.name: -exec
options.description: Run a command on each match; terminate with ;

options.name: -print
options.description: Print the full path of each match

options.name: -print0
options.description: Print matches separated by a null byte

options.name: -prune
options.description: Do not descend into the matched directory
